# PagoPay

> PagoPay is a crypto-to-fiat payment platform that lets users deposit Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, USDC, and other cryptocurrencies, automatically convert them to USD, and spend anywhere in the world using a prepaid card. Zero foreign exchange fees. No hidden costs. Works at millions of merchants and ATMs worldwide.

## Key Facts
- Category: Crypto payments / fintech
- Headquarters: Quebec, Canada
- Operator: 9538-8310 Québec Inc.
- Regulatory status: Registered Money Services Business with FINTRAC (Canada)
- Crypto custody partner: ALT 5 Sigma
- Card network: Major card networks accepted worldwide
- Supported cryptocurrencies: BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, and more
- Conversion: Instant crypto-to-USD at market rates
- Foreign exchange fees: $0
- Daily POS limit: $100,000 | Daily ATM limit: $2,000
- Security: AES-256 encryption, 2FA, biometric login, AI-powered fraud monitoring
- Compliance: AML, KYC, GDPR, PCI DSS

## How It Works
1. Create a free account and complete identity verification
2. Deposit crypto (BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC, or others) into your PagoPay wallet
3. Crypto is instantly converted to USD at market rates
4. Spend with your virtual or physical PagoPay prepaid card anywhere, or withdraw cash at any ATM

## Who It's For
- Crypto holders who want to spend digital assets in everyday life
- International travelers seeking zero-FX-fee payments
- Users in Latin America and Africa looking for cross-border spending without bank accounts
- Freelancers and remote workers paid in crypto who need fiat spending power

## Pricing
- Plastic Card: $19.99 one-time + $3.50/month (first month free), 3% add-funds commission
- Metal Card: $500 one-time (covers 2 years, no monthly fee), 2.5% add-funds commission
- Daily POS limit: $100,000 (both tiers)
- Daily ATM limit: $2,000 (both tiers)
- Foreign exchange fees: $0 (both tiers)
- Supported cryptos: 12+ including BTC, ETH, USDT, USDC
- Metal exclusive perks: Luxury Marketplace, Private Jet access, Exclusive Member Events, 24/7 Concierge Support

## Competitive Advantages
- Zero foreign exchange fees on international spending
- Instant crypto-to-USD conversion (no delays)
- Works without a traditional bank account
- FINTRAC-registered and fully compliant
- Accepted in 160+ countries
- 3DS Secure enabled on all cards
- Metal tier includes luxury lifestyle perks (Private Jet, Concierge, Events)
- Supports multiple major cryptocurrencies
- Up to $100,000 daily POS spending on both card tiers
- 24/7 human support
